zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth於1490年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯時，他的父親Richard Pargiter40歲，母親Anne Coles41歲。他於1508年8月5日與Lady Anna Louise Knight在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年2月4日在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth于1490年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯时，他的父亲Richard Pargiter40岁，母亲Anne Coles41岁。他于1508年8月5日与Lady Anna Louise Knight在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1556年2月4日在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特。

variants.name: Pargeter
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English pargeter ‘plasterer’, from Middle English parget ‘plaster spread on walls and ceilings, whitewash’ + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth was born in 1490, in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Richard Pargiter, was 40 and his mother, Anne Coles, was 41. He married Lady Anna Louise Knight on 5 August 1508, in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 February 1556, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Westminster, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth est né en 1490, à Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Pargiter, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Anne Coles, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anna Louise Knight le 5 août 1508, à Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 février 1556, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth 1490 in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Pargiter 40 und seine Mutter Anne Coles 41. Er hat am 5. August 1508 in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England Lady Anna Louise Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Februar 1556 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Westminster, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth è nato il nel 1490 nel Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Pargiter, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Anne Coles, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anna Louise Knight il 5 agosto 1508, nel Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 febbraio 1556, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Westminster, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworthが1490年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアトウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard Pargiterは40歳，母Anne Colesは41歳であった。1508年8月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアトウオルスでLady Anna Louise Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1556年2月4日に故郷で66歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth(이)가 1490년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Pargiter(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Coles(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1508년 8월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트워스에서 Lady Anna Louise Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 2월 4일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth nasceu em 1490, em Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Pargiter, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Anne Coles, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anna Louise Knight em 5 de agosto de 1508, em Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1556, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth родился в 1490 г. в местности гритворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Pargiter было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Coles, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anna Louise Knight 5 августа 1508 г. в местности гритворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 февраля 1556 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth nació en 1490, en Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Pargiter, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Anne Coles, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Lady Anna Louise Knight el 5 de agosto de 1508, en Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de febrero de 1556, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
